mechanism_narrative: A positive 3-month growth trend in retail sales signals resilient household demand and near-term earnings support, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days when the trend is observed.
evidence_refs: fact:Latest available RSAFS vintage before 2024-01-15 was 2023-11-01 with value 705692.0
failure_condition: Reject if positive 3-month RSAFS growth is followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns no more often than the unconditional base rate over a 3-year rolling walk-forward window.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate crosses above 5.0%, restrictive monetary policy raises discount rates and tightens financial conditions, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:Latest available FEDFUNDS vintage before 2024-01-15 was 2023-12-01 with value 5.33
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations have positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if their mean forward return is not below the unconditional mean at p <= 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the unemployment rate of more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months signals labor-market deterioration and recession risk, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:Latest available UNRATE vintage before 2024-01-15 was 2023-12-01 with value 3.7
failure_condition: Reject if the 60-day forward return after the trigger is not lower than the unconditional 60-day return in at least 70% of rolling 5-year walk-forward evaluation windows.

mechanism_narrative: A negative 3-month change in industrial production signals weakening real activity and declining operating leverage, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:Latest available INDPRO vintage before 2024-01-15 was 2023-11-01 with value 102.6651
failure_condition: Reject if triggered INDPRO contractions produce positive 20-day S&P 500 returns more often than the unconditional base rate or if the sign of the estimated coefficient is positive in two consecutive 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: When housing starts cross below their 12-month moving average, residential investment is contracting and cyclically sensitive earnings expectations deteriorate, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses below its 12-month moving average
evidence_refs: fact:Latest available HOUST vintage before 2024-01-15 was 2023-11-01 with value 1560.0
failure_condition: Reject if the mean 60-day S&P 500 return following the trigger is greater than or equal to the unconditional mean return in walk-forward tests after transaction-date alignment.

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth combined with a falling unemployment rate while policy rates are high signals labor overheating that delays monetary easing, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month change > 450000 and UNRATE 3-month change < 0 while FEDFUNDS > 4.5%
evidence_refs: fact:Latest available PAYEMS vintage before 2024-01-15 was 2023-12-01 with value 157232.0
failure_condition: Reject if the interaction term PAYEMS growth x falling UNRATE under FEDFUNDS > 4.5% has a non-negative coefficient for 20-day returns in more than half of rolling 4-year walk-forward windows.

mechanism_narrative: Falling CPI inflation while the federal funds rate is stable or declining signals disinflation without incremental policy tightening, compressing expected discount rates and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized growth falls below its 12-month growth and FEDFUNDS 1-month change <= 0
evidence_refs: fact:Latest available CPIAUCSL vintage before 2024-01-15 was 2023-12-01 with value 308.85
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations do not deliver a positive average 5-day S&P 500 return or if the hit rate is below 50% across two consecutive 2-year walk-forward windows.

mechanism_narrative: A real GDP growth slowdown below a 1% annualized quarterly pace signals broad demand weakness and earnings downgrade risk, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 quarter-over-quarter annualized growth crosses below 1.0%
evidence_refs: fact:Latest available GDPC1 vintage before 2024-01-15 was 2023-07-01 with value 22490.692
failure_condition: Reject if GDPC1 growth crossings below 1.0% are followed by 60-day S&P 500 returns that are statistically indistinguishable from or greater than the unconditional mean return at p <= 0.10.
